Name: WEAPON_ATTACK_MOTION_PARAM
Description: Defines weapon attack motion behavior, including animation playback, directional control, timing, and linked damage/bullet data for attacks.

Fields.Name: Attack Animation
Fields.Description: Animation ID used for the weapon attack motion.

Fields.Name: Control Type
Fields.Description: Defines how the attack motion is controlled or adjusted during execution.

Fields.Name: Start Animation Speed
Fields.Description: Playback speed multiplier at the beginning of the attack animation.

Fields.Name: End Animation Speed
Fields.Description: Playback speed multiplier at the end of the attack animation.

Fields.Name: Rotation Speed Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier affecting how quickly the character rotates during the attack.

Fields.Name: Angle Limit Scale
Fields.Description: Multiplier controlling maximum allowable rotation angle during attack motion.

Fields.Name: Position Prediction Time
Fields.Description: Time used to predict target position for directional attacks.

Fields.Name: Wrist Tilt Rate
Fields.Description: Amount of wrist tilt applied during attack animation.

Fields.Name: Hand Stagger Blend Weight
Fields.Description: Maximum blend weight applied to hand motion staggering.

Fields.Name: Pelvis Stagger Blend Weight
Fields.Description: Maximum blend weight applied to body/pelvis staggering when stats are insufficient.

Fields.Name: Attack Pushback Rate
Fields.Description: Amount of pushback applied during attack impact.

Fields.Name: Damage ID 01
Fields.Description: Reference to primary damage configuration.

Fields.Name: Damage ID 02
Fields.Description: Reference to secondary damage configuration.

Fields.Name: Damage ID 03
Fields.Description: Reference to tertiary damage configuration.

Fields.Name: Bullet ID 01
Fields.Description: Primary projectile/bullet reference.

Fields.Name: Bullet Damage ID 01
Fields.Description: Damage profile linked to bullet 01.

Fields.Name: Bullet ID 02
Fields.Description: Secondary projectile/bullet reference.

Fields.Name: Bullet Damage ID 02
Fields.Description: Damage profile linked to bullet 02.

Fields.Name: Bullet ID 03
Fields.Description: Tertiary projectile/bullet reference.

Fields.Name: Bullet Damage ID 03
Fields.Description: Damage profile linked to bullet 03.
